_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to conduct technical exchanges and hot washes of assessment findings with non-technical audiences.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in communicating research findings to both technical and non-technical audiences, including paper writing, conference presentation, and internal briefing formats.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-002 (AB, cosine: 0.642), RM-S-005 (RM, cosine: 0.534).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.5/10 (raw 0.647). Shared vocabulary: [audiences, findings, non, technical]. DCWF-only terms [ability, assessment, conduct, exchanges, hot, washes] vs WIDAI-only terms [briefing, communicating, conference, formats, internal, paper] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.892 (P=0.895, R=0.888). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Ability to conduct technical exchanges and hot washes of assessment findings wit" and "Skill in communicating research findings to both technical and non-technical aud" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.643 ≈ STS 0.647 (gap 0.004). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [audiences, findings, non, technical] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 22.2%. Shared tokens: [audiences, findings, non, technical]. DCWF-only: [ability, assessment, conduct, exchanges, hot, washes]. WIDAI-only: [briefing, communicating, conference, formats, internal, paper].
